title: Summer Camp Care Package Letter
text:
## Summer Camp Care Package Letter

Dear {person},

We miss your {adjective} laugh and the way you {verb} every morning.

Camp sounds {adjective}. Did you really {past-tense verb} a {animal} near the {place}?

We packed {number} {food} snacks, a {color} {clothing item}, and a photo of your {object}.

Please write back and tell us about your {adjective} counselor.

Do not {verb} with {plural noun} after lights out.

Love,

Mom, Dad, and the {adjective} {animal} at home
